opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My face and scalp are completely covered in these gross, greasy yellow scabs. My eyelids are stuck together, and it burns so badly I can't even go outside.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It has flared up really badly over the last three days - the greasy flakes are everywhere, my eyelids crust over and stick shut, and the burning and embarrassment mean I haven't been able to face work or leave the house.

symptom_narrative.onset: a sudden severe flare over the last 72 hours, on a background of mild dandruff for years
symptom_narrative.character: thick, greasy, yellow flakes and crusts sitting on red skin; the eyelid edges get crusty and glue the eyes shut overnight
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it has ever been - intensely itchy and burning, and so embarrassing I feel I can't be seen
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: scalp, eyebrows, the creases beside the nose, the eyelids, and the middle of the chest
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, worse in the mornings when the eyelids are crusted shut
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much so far; washing loosens some flakes briefly
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: stress and the cold dry winter weather seem to set it off; rubbing and scratching
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: severe itch, burning of the skin and eyelid margins, eyes crusting and sticking together on waking; feeling very self-conscious and low
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: years of mild flaky dandruff that came and went, but never anything like this severe facial and eyelid flare
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: housebound and off work because of the discomfort and the appearance

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long history of mild dandruff / flaky scalp

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: recent period of extreme psychological stress; onset of cold dry winter weather; currently housebound and unable to attend work, feeling significant embarrassment and low mood about appearance

objective_data_offered.value: widespread thick greasy yellow scale over the scalp, eyebrows, the creases beside the nose and the mid-chest, sitting on reddened skin; the eyelid margins are crusted with greasy debris at the base of the lashes
eyes crust over and stick shut on waking; the eyelid edges and facial skin burn
no fever - felt normal, did not feel hot or shivery
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported impression, no measured home thermometer reading available

objective_data_offered.value: eyesight seems normal once the crusts are cleared away; no blurring, no double vision, and looking at light does not hurt
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-assessment only; not a formal visual-acuity test
